login.title: Sign in to your account
login.accountLocked: Account temporarily locked, try again later
login.emailRequired: Unable to retrieve email address. Please set a public email on the provider and try again
login.usernameRequired: Please enter your username or email first

consent.title: Review the access request
consent.requestedAccess: This application is requesting access to the following scopes.
consent.approveError: Unable to approve the access request
consent.denyError: Unable to cancel the access request

register.title: Create a new account
register.passwordHint: Min 12 chars with uppercase, lowercase, digit and special character

dashboard.title: Control Center
dashboard.heroDescription: Stand up your first application, verify sign-in flow, and keep an eye on account activity from one place.
dashboard.setupDescription: Move from first application to first successful user sign-in without leaving the console.
dashboard.setupCreateDescription: Generate client credentials and define the callback URL your product will use.
dashboard.setupConfigureTitle: Review client ID and redirect URI
dashboard.setupConfigureDescription: Open your application detail page and verify the values your product will send during login.
dashboard.setupVerifyDescription: Finish one real authorization flow to confirm cookies, callback handling, and user mapping are wired correctly.
dashboard.platformSnapshotDescription: Admin-only capacity and activity numbers for the current deployment.
dashboard.quickAccessDescription: Jump straight into the areas you are most likely to operate during setup and daily maintenance.
dashboard.quickAccessApplications: Create, inspect, and operate your OAuth applications.
dashboard.quickAccessProfile: Open account, security, and linked identity settings.
dashboard.quickAccessPoints: Check balances, streaks, and point transaction history.
dashboard.quickAccessAdmin: Open the admin console for platform-wide operations.
dashboard.signInsDescription: Recent volume by application so you can see which integrations are actually live.
dashboard.emptyDescription: Create an application first. Once a sign-in completes, activity will show up here.

users.title: Users
users.deleteConfirm: Delete this user? This action cannot be undone.
users.passwordWarning: Copy the password now. It won't be shown again.

clients.title: OAuth Clients
clients.name: Name
clients.requireConsentDesc: Show the consent page until the user grants this client access. Remembered grants skip later prompts unless the request uses prompt=consent.
clients.deleteConfirm: Delete this client? This action cannot be undone.
clients.secretWarning: Copy the client secret now. It won't be shown again.

apps.title: Applications
apps.name: Name
apps.requireConsentDesc: Show the consent page until the user grants this application access. Remembered grants skip later prompts unless the request uses prompt=consent.
apps.deleteConfirm: Delete this app? This action cannot be undone.
apps.secretWarning: Copy the client secret now. It won't be shown again.
apps.oidcEndpointsDesc: Use these endpoints to integrate OIDC login with your app
apps.githubCompatDesc: Use these if your app only supports GitHub OAuth
apps.machineAccessEnabledDesc: This application can issue machine tokens through client_credentials and supports introspection and revocation.
apps.machineAccessDisabledDesc: Enable client_credentials in grant types to use machine token lifecycle endpoints.
apps.tokenLifecycleDesc: Operate machine tokens for this client without manually supplying the stored client secret.
apps.secretRevealHelp: Shown once after create or rotate. Copy it now.
apps.introspectionResultDesc: Latest token metadata returned by the operator endpoint.
apps.subject: Subject

providers.title: Social Providers
providers.name: Provider Name
providers.deleteConfirm: Delete this provider? This action cannot be undone.

settings.title: Settings
settings.registerEnabledDesc: Allow public user registration via API
settings.siteTitleDesc: Browser tab title. Leave empty to use default
settings.corsOriginsDesc: Comma-separated origins. Leave empty to allow all.
settings.webauthnDesc: Configure Relying Party parameters for passwordless login
settings.turnstileDesc: Configure Turnstile CAPTCHA for registration anti-bot protection
settings.emailVerificationDesc: Require users to verify their email address after registration
settings.smtpDesc: Configure SMTP server for sending verification emails
settings.testEmailRecipientDesc: Optional. Leave empty to use From Address or SMTP Username

email.verifiedDesc: Your email has been verified successfully
email.checkInbox: Please check your inbox and click the verification link

mfa.title: Multi-Factor Authentication
mfa.verifyDesc: Enter your verification code to continue
mfa.totpDesc: Scan the QR code with Google Authenticator or similar app
mfa.setupDesc: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app, or enter the secret manually
mfa.backupCodesDesc: Save these backup codes securely. Each can only be used once
mfa.webauthnPrompt: Click the button below to verify with your security key

webauthn.title: Passkey / Security Key
webauthn.notConfigured: WebAuthn is not configured. Please set RP ID and RP Origins in system settings.
webauthn.name: Key Name

auditLogs.title: Audit Logs
auditLogs.subtitle: Review write operations, security events, and source-tracked system activity in one place.
auditLogs.filtersDescription: Filter by user, action, resource, source, status, and keyword.
auditLogs.keywordPlaceholder: Search username, resource ID, detail, or UA

authInit.serviceUnavailableDescription: Authentication initialization hit a temporary service error. This usually happens during backend rolling restarts or a brief gateway outage. Please retry shortly.
authInit.notFoundDescription: The environment is missing the authentication bootstrap endpoint. This usually points to a routing, proxy, or deployment misconfiguration.

unauthorized.title: Authentication expired
unauthorized.description: This request requires a fresh sign-in before it can continue.

forbidden.title: Access denied
forbidden.description: Your account does not have permission to view this page or perform this action.

not_found.title: Resource not found
not_found.description: The target endpoint or resource could not be found. It may have been removed, or the environment routing is misconfigured.

server.title: Service temporarily unavailable
server.description: The server returned an unexpected response. This is usually a temporary fault or restart window, so retry shortly.

network.title: Network connection problem
network.description: The request did not reach the server. Check the network, gateway, or proxy path.

timeout.title: Request timed out
timeout.description: The service took too long to respond. Please retry in a moment.

unknown.title: Request failed
unknown.description: An unclassified error occurred. Retry and inspect the server logs if it keeps happening.

points.title: Points Center
points.emailVerificationDesc: Check-in feature requires email verification. We've sent a verification email to {{email}}. Please check your inbox.

adminPoints.title: Points Management
adminPoints.amountHint: Positive to add, negative to deduct

profile.title: Profile
profile.setPasswordDesc: You signed up via social login. Set a password to enable password login.
profile.passwordHint: Min 12 chars with uppercase, lowercase, digit and special character
profile.authorizedAppsDesc: Review apps that can access your account and revoke remembered consent.
profile.unlinkConfirm: Are you sure you want to unlink this account?
